sarma_description: Delicate grape leaves hand-rolled around a savory filling of rice, herbs, and spices. A classic Turkish meze.
falafel_description: Crispy deep-fried patties of spiced ground chickpeas and fava beans, served with a tahini dip.
adana_kebab_description: Spicy minced lamb kebab, grilled on a wide skewer, served with bulgur pilaf and grilled vegetables.
iskender_kebab_special_description: Succulent döner kebab slices served over pita bread, generously topped with a rich tomato sauce, yogurt, and sizzling melted butter. A true Turkish delight!
home_page_title: RUMI Restaurant - Authentic Turkish Cuisine in Geneva, Switzerland
home_page_description: Experience the rich flavors of Turkey at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva. We offer a wide range of authentic dishes, from kebabs to mezes, in a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Halal options available.
home_hero_subtitle: Your Culinary Journey to Turkey Begins Here in Geneva
home_story_content: RUMI Restaurant brings the heart of Turkish culinary traditions to Geneva. Our passion is to share the rich tapestry of flavors, aromas, and hospitality that Turkish cuisine is renowned for. Each dish is crafted with the freshest ingredients and a deep respect for authentic recipes passed down through generations. Join us for a memorable dining experience.

menu_page_title: RUMI Restaurant Menu - Starters, Main Courses, Desserts | Geneva
menu_page_description: Explore the delicious and authentic Turkish menu at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva. From savory kebabs to delightful mezes and traditional desserts. Halal options available.
